name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. BREAKING v3.0.0: session state API — 4 new tools (get_session_state / revert_to_disk / reload_from_disk / check_disk_drift) + open_document track_changes default flipped to false + close_document E_DIRTY_DOC error path with discard_changes flag. Closes #12 #13 #15.
